# The Cyber Adviser

> The Cyber Adviser is a strategic cybersecurity consultancy led by Attique Bhatti, an Enterprise Cloud Security Consultant and certified instructor across Palo Alto Networks, Check Point, and F5. It advises enterprises on Zero Trust adoption, SASE/Prisma Access transformation, NGFW and segmentation, Cortex (XDR/XSOAR/XSIAM) SOC automation, and security architecture modernization, and publishes free interactive security tools and training.

## Services
- [Services](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/services): Zero Trust architecture, SASE & Prisma Access, NGFW/segmentation, Cortex SOC automation (XSOAR/XSIAM), incident response advisory.
- [About](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/about): Background and expertise of Attique Bhatti.
- [AI Overview Source](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/ai-overview): Concise entity, service, founder, tool, and topic summary for AI search systems.
- [Contact](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/contact): Request a consultation.

## Free Tools
- [Tools](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools): Overview of all interactive tools.
- [Unified Migration](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools/unified-migration): Convert firewall configs across vendors (Cisco ASA, FortiGate, Check Point, PAN-OS) and Panorama → Strata Cloud Manager (SCM), plus Netskope/Zscaler → Prisma Access.
- [Prisma Access Sizing Calculator](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools/prisma-access-sizing): Estimate Prisma Access sizing.
- [SIEM Sizing Calculator](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools/siem-sizing): Estimate SIEM/SOAR storage and compute.
- [CyberQuiz](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools/cyberquiz): Real-time multiplayer cybersecurity quiz platform with curated PANW, Check Point, and F5 question banks.
- [AI Training Chatbot](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/tools/ai-chatbot): Post-training Q&A for course alumni.

## Knowledge Base (technical guides)
- [Knowledge Base](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base): Index of technical guides on Palo Alto Networks, Check Point, Fortinet, and Zero Trust/SASE architecture.
- [Integrating SD-WAN with Prisma Access](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/integrating-sdwan-prisma-access): Converging Prisma SD-WAN branches with Prisma Access into one SASE fabric — traffic steering, service connections, BGP routing, and policy ownership.
- [Scaling Mobile User Gateways (MUG)](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/scaling-mobile-user-gateways): Capacity, autoscale behavior, IP pool sizing, gateway placement, and onboarding for scaling Prisma Access mobile users.
- [Seamless Migration from MPLS to Broadband](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/mpls-to-broadband-sdwan): Phased, zero-downtime plan to overlay Prisma SD-WAN, shift to broadband with app-defined path selection, and decommission MPLS.
- [Prisma Access: Optimizing Split-Tunneling](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/prisma-split-tunneling): Latency reduction for global remote workforces using Strata and Prisma Access.
- [Securing Hybrid Cloud Connectivity](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/hybrid-cloud-connectivity): Secure transit patterns between on-premise networks, AWS Transit Gateways, and Azure vWANs.
- [Building Your First Phishing Triage Playbook](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/knowledge-base/phishing-triage-playbook): Cortex XSOAR playbook design to ingest, enrich, and triage phishing indicators.

## Blog (insights)
- [Blog](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/blogs): Index of articles on Cortex XDR/XSIAM, Prisma SASE, Strata NGFW, Zero Trust, and identity security.
- [Identity Threat Detection and Response (ITDR)](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/blogs/identity-is-the-new-security-perimeter-itdr): Why identity is the new perimeter and how ITDR detects credential abuse and lateral movement.
- [Prisma Access and the SASE Architecture Shift](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/blogs/prisma-access-sase-revolution): Planning a Prisma Access SASE transformation — mobile users, service connections, remote networks, routing.
- [From Legacy VPN to ZTNA: A Phased Migration Strategy](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/blogs/legacy-vpn-to-ztna-the-migration-plan): A practical roadmap for moving from VPN to Zero Trust Network Access.
- [Cortex XSOAR for Modern SOC Automation](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/blogs/cortex-xsoar-transforming-soc-operations): Orchestrating tools, automating enrichment, and reducing manual triage in the SOC.

## Reputation
- [Student Reviews & Testimonials](https://www.thecyberadviser.com/testimonials): Verified 5-star feedback from Attique Bhatti's instructor-led Palo Alto Networks and Prisma SD-WAN training.
